title: Command Center unified Work Intake and kickoff flow Engineering Spec
summary: This Feature SHALL deliver the Command Center Work Intake / Kickoff surface at route /work-intake so operators start feature-delivery without copy/paste or a terminal pan run invocation. The Feature SHALL implement ux-spec §4.3 and contract…
archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
